```# ====================================================================
# PAIRED SHANNON PLOT – CUSTOM STRATA (AB, PPI, OTH, NO)
# ====================================================================

library(phyloseq)
library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)
library(ggpubr)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load phyloseq object and remove bad batches
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps <- readRDS('./RSF_all_physeq_wgs_COUNTS_v3.rds')

ps@sam_data$Batch <- as.factor(ps@sam_data$Batch)
#bad_batch_samples <- c("AO-203-2", "AO-207-1", "B-022-2", "MB124-2")
bad_batch_samples <- c('B-024-1', 'B-024-2', 'B-027-2', 'B-030-2')
if (length(bad_batch_samples) > 0) {
  ps <- prune_samples(!(sample_names(ps) %in% bad_batch_samples), ps)
  cat("Removed", length(bad_batch_samples), "samples\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Create Strata column (and replace original Group)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sam <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sam$SampleID <- rownames(sam)

sam$Strata <- NA_character_
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "A"] <- "AB"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "C"] <- "NO"
sam$Strata[sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "Yes" & is.na(sam$Strata)] <- "PPI"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "B" & is.na(sam$Strata) & sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "No"] <- "OTH"
sam$Strata <- factor(sam$Strata, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))

# Check assignment
if (any(is.na(sam$Strata))) {
  cat("Warning: unassigned samples:\n")
  print(table(sam$Group[is.na(sam$Strata)], sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors[is.na(sam$Strata)]))
}
sam$Strata <- factor(sam$Strata, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))

# Replace the original Group with Strata for plotting
sample_data(ps) <- sam
sample_data(ps)$Group <- sample_data(ps)$Strata   # overwrite Group

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Compute Shannon and prepare paired data
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract metadata
meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
meta$SampleID <- rownames(meta)
meta <- as_tibble(meta)
otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps))

# OTU table -> Shannon (samples as rows)
#if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
#  otu_mat <- t(as.matrix(otu_table(ps)))
#} else {
#  otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps))
#}
otu_mat <- t(as.matrix(otu_table(ps)))
#mode(otu_mat) <- "numeric"
shannon_vals <- microbiome::diversity(otu_mat, index = "shannon")
shannon_df <- data.frame(SampleID = rownames(shannon_vals), 
                         Shannon = shannon_vals, 
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Merge
meta$Shannon <- shannon_df$shannon[match(meta$SampleID, shannon_df$SampleID)]
stopifnot(!all(is.na(meta$Shannon)))

# Keep only patients with both timepoints (-1 and -2)
paired <- meta %>%
  group_by(No_Patient) %>%
  filter(all(c("-1", "-2") %in% Timepoint)) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("Number of paired patients:", n_distinct(paired$No_Patient), "\n")
cat("Shannon summary:\n")
print(summary(paired$Shannon))
cat("Strata counts in paired data:\n")
print(table(paired$Strata))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot: Strata on x-axis, two timepoints per strata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
plot_paired_shannon <- function(data, output_dir) {
  
  data$Timepoint <- factor(data$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  data$Group <- factor(data$Group, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))  # ensure order
  data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(Shannon))
  
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    cat("  No valid Shannon values. Skipping plot.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  time_colors <- c("-1" = "#1f77b4", "-2" = "#ff7f0e")
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Group, y = Shannon, fill = Timepoint)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA, 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.6) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.8), 
               size = 2, alpha = 0.6, aes(color = Timepoint)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = time_colors, name = "Timepoint") +
    scale_color_manual(values = time_colors, guide = "none") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    labs(y = "Shannon Index") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "top")
  
  # Paired Wilcoxon tests for each strata
  groups <- levels(data$Group)
  p_vals <- data.frame()
  for (g in groups) {
    sub <- data %>% filter(Group == g)
    if (n_distinct(sub$Timepoint) == 2 && nrow(sub) >= 2) {
      wide <- sub %>% select(No_Patient, Timepoint, Shannon) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = Shannon)
      if (sum(!is.na(wide[["-1"]])) >= 2 && sum(!is.na(wide[["-2"]])) >= 2) {
        test <- wilcox.test(wide[["-1"]], wide[["-2"]], paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
        p_vals <- rbind(p_vals, data.frame(Group = g, p.value = test$p.value))
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(p_vals) > 0) {
    p_vals$signif <- ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.001, "***",
                            ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                   ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    y_max <- max(data$Shannon, na.rm = TRUE)
    y_range <- diff(range(data$Shannon, na.rm = TRUE))
    bracket_y <- y_max + 0.05 * y_range
    step <- 0.08 * y_range
    
    for (i in 1:nrow(p_vals)) {
      g <- p_vals$Group[i]
      x_pos <- as.numeric(factor(g, levels = groups))
      x1 <- x_pos - 0.2
      x2 <- x_pos + 0.2
      p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2, y = bracket_y + (i-1)*step,
                        yend = bracket_y + (i-1)*step, color = "black") +
        annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = bracket_y + (i-1)*step + 0.02*y_range,
                 label = p_vals$signif[i], size = 5, vjust = 0)
    }
  }
  
  p <- p + ggtitle("Shannon Diversity by Timepoint")
  
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  fname <- "paired_shannon_strata_AB_PPI_OTH_NO.png"
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, fname), p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  cat("  Saved:", file.path(output_dir, fname), "\n")
  return(p)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Run the plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------
output_dir <- "/paired_shannon_analysis_custom_strata"
plot_paired_shannon(paired, output_dir)
plot_paired_shannon <- function(data, output_dir) {
  
  data$Timepoint <- factor(data$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  data$Group <- factor(data$Group, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))
  data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(Shannon))
  
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    cat("  No valid Shannon values. Skipping plot.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # ---- Colours (unchanged) ----
  strata_colors_reg <- c(
    AB  = "#E41A1C",
    PPI = "#377EB8",
    OTH = "#4DAF4A",
    NO  = "#984EA3"
  )
  
  lighten <- function(col, factor = 0.6) {
    rgb(t(col2rgb(col) + (255 - col2rgb(col)) * factor), maxColorValue = 255)
  }
  strata_colors_light <- sapply(strata_colors_reg, lighten)
  
  all_color_names <- c(paste0(names(strata_colors_reg),   "_-2"),
                       paste0(names(strata_colors_light), "_-1"))
  all_color_values <- c(unname(strata_colors_reg),
                        unname(strata_colors_light))
  all_colors <- setNames(all_color_values, all_color_names)
  
  data$GroupTime <- interaction(data$Group, data$Timepoint, sep = "_")
  
  # ---- Base plot ----
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Group, y = Shannon, fill = GroupTime)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA, 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.6) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.8), 
               size = 2, alpha = 0.6, aes(color = GroupTime)) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = all_colors,
      breaks = paste0(names(strata_colors_reg), "_-2"),
      labels = names(strata_colors_reg),
      name = "Group"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = all_colors, guide = "none") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    labs(y = "Shannon Index") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          legend.position = "top",
          plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 15, 5))   # extra bottom space for labels
  
  # ---- Timepoint labels at the x-axis (below each box) ----
  # One label per group×timepoint, positioned at y = -Inf (bottom of panel)
  label_df <- data %>%
    group_by(Group, Timepoint) %>%
    summarise(.groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(GroupTime = interaction(Group, Timepoint, sep = "_"))
  
  p <- p + geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = Group, y = -Inf, label = Timepoint, group = GroupTime),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    size = 3,
    vjust = 1.5,                 # pushes text below the panel edge
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")  # allow drawing outside the panel
  
  # ---- Paired Wilcoxon tests (unchanged) ----
  groups <- levels(data$Group)
  p_vals <- data.frame()
  for (g in groups) {
    sub <- data %>% filter(Group == g)
    if (n_distinct(sub$Timepoint) == 2 && nrow(sub) >= 2) {
      wide <- sub %>% select(No_Patient, Timepoint, Shannon) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = Shannon)
      if (sum(!is.na(wide[["-1"]])) >= 2 && sum(!is.na(wide[["-2"]])) >= 2) {
        test <- wilcox.test(wide[["-1"]], wide[["-2"]], paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
        p_vals <- rbind(p_vals, data.frame(Group = g, p.value = test$p.value))
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(p_vals) > 0) {
    p_vals$signif <- ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.001, "***",
                            ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                                   ifelse(p_vals$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    y_max <- max(data$Shannon, na.rm = TRUE)
    y_range <- diff(range(data$Shannon, na.rm = TRUE))
    bracket_y <- y_max + 0.05 * y_range
    step <- 0.08 * y_range
    
    for (i in 1:nrow(p_vals)) {
      g <- p_vals$Group[i]
      x_pos <- as.numeric(factor(g, levels = groups))
      x1 <- x_pos - 0.2
      x2 <- x_pos + 0.2
      p <- p + annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2, y = bracket_y + (i-1)*step,
                        yend = bracket_y + (i-1)*step, color = "black") +
        annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = bracket_y + (i-1)*step + 0.02*y_range,
                 label = p_vals$signif[i], size = 5, vjust = 0)
    }
  }
  
  p <- p + ggtitle("Shannon Diversity by Timepoint")
  
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  fname <- "paired_shannon_strata_AB_PPI_OTH_NO.png"
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, fname), p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  cat("  Saved:", file.path(output_dir, fname), "\n")
  return(p)
}
output_dir <- "/paired_shannon_analysis_custom_strata"
plot_paired_shannon(paired, output_dir)
```
